caption: A man with a shaved head and a full beard is recorded in a studio setting against a black acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Humble". A professional silver condenser microphone on a shock mount is positioned directly in front of him. Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions shift as he speaks. He begins with a slight, closed-mouth smile, which opens into a wider grin showing his teeth. He then transitions back to a more neutral expression while speaking and finally looks slightly off-camera with a focused gaze. His posture remains steady throughout the clip, and the camera angle stays fixed, focusing on his head and shoulders.
